diagrams.title: Transfer Learning
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the concept of transfer learning, including the source domain, target domain, and model.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of transfer learning and its components.

diagrams.title: Fine-Tuning
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the concept of fine-tuning, including the pretrained model, new task, and adjusted weights.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of fine-tuning and its components.

diagrams.title: Feature Extraction
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the concept of feature extraction, including the pretrained model, data, and extracted features.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of feature extraction and its components.
